case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. NIMFA V CASILLA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-19-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASILLA, NIMFA V $1,785.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,835.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) AS TO DEFENDANT CASILLA, NIMFA V ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED JUN-19-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASILLA, NIMFA V
